# Initiate Performance Test

**Web Service Endpoint**

Initiates a performance test

## Discussion

Call this endpoint to start a new performance test. The service returns a response that includes a [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/PerformanceTestConfig] object that describes the testing parameters and a `requestId` you can use to request test results.

## Server performance testing

- **Get Performance Test Results**: Gets the results of the performance test for the specified identifier.

items.description: Gets the results of the performance test for the specified identifier.
